name: SAFE-MCP / SAF-MCP
note: Contributed detection techniques and mitigations to a community security framework for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) — an ATT&CK-style catalogue of agentic-system threats and defenses

name: AgentGuard
note: Zero-Trust protocol for AI agents: identity, policy, mTLS, audit (Python SDK + Go server)

name: spiffe-core · TraT
note: SPIFFE-based agent identity/attestation and Transaction Tokens for multi-agent workflows

name: Vibe-Coder
note: An agent that builds Streamlit/FastAPI apps
